labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Skiplagged MCP" provides 10 tools for maps & location tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Maps & Location" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: sk_flights_search
tools.title: Skiplagged Flights Search
tools.description: Search Skiplagged for flights between specific locations with filtering options for passengers, fare class, stops, airlines, and timing preferences

limit.description: Maximum number of flights to return (default: 12, max: 100)

offset.description: Number of flights to skip for pagination (default: 0)

sort.description: Sort flights by price (cheapest first), duration (shortest first), or value (best price/time ratio, default)

maxStops.description: Maximum number of stops (none=nonstop, one=1 stop, many=2+ stops)

departureTimeEarliest.description: Earliest departure time in minutes from midnight (0-1439)

departureTimeLatest.description: Latest departure time in minutes from midnight (0-1439)

arrivalTimeEarliest.description: Earliest arrival time in minutes from midnight (0-1439)

arrivalTimeLatest.description: Latest arrival time in minutes from midnight (0-1439)

maxFlightDuration.description: Maximum total flight duration in minutes

departureAirports.description: Array of specific departure airport codes to include (when origin city has multiple airports)

arrivalAirports.description: Array of specific arrival airport codes to include (when destination city has multiple airports)

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

searchUrl.description: Complete search URL with all parameters

currentlyShowing.description: Number of flights in this result set

tools.name: sk_destinations_anywhere
tools.title: Skiplagged Flexible Destination Search
tools.description: Find cheapest destinations from a departure city when flexible about where to go. Perfect for discovering travel opportunities and deals.

from.description: Departure IATA code or city name

return.description: Return date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional for one-way trips)

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

searchUrl.description: Complete search URL with all parameters

currentlyShowing.description: Number of destinations in this result set

tools.name: sk_flex_departure_calendar
tools.title: Skiplagged One-Way Fare Calendar
tools.description: Generate a flexible calendar of the lowest one-way fares around a chosen departure, returning date → cheapest-price entries to help pick the best day to fly. Intended for flexible-date price discovery, not exact itinerary selection.

origin.description: Departure city name or IATA code (will be resolved to IATA code automatically)

destination.description: Arrival city name or IATA code (will be resolved to IATA code automatically)

returnDate.description: Return date for matching trip length (optional, YYYY-MM-DD format)

sort.description: Sort results chronologically or by lowest price first

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

searchUrl.description: Complete search URL with all parameters

origin.description: Resolved origin airport code used for this search

destination.description: Resolved destination airport code used for this search

mode.description: Indicates whether these options vary departure dates or return dates

sort.description: Ordering applied to the options array

tools.name: sk_flex_return_calendar
tools.title: Skiplagged Round-Trip Price Calendar
tools.description: Generate a flexible round-trip price calendar for a fixed-length stay around a chosen travel window. Returns (depart date, return date, lowest total price) entries for nearby date pairs that preserve the original trip length; intended for price discovery, not exact itinerary selection.

origin.description: Departure city name or IATA code (will be resolved to IATA code automatically)

destination.description: Arrival city name or IATA code (will be resolved to IATA code automatically)

returnDate.description: Return date for the reference trip (YYYY-MM-DD format)

sort.description: Sort results chronologically or by lowest price first

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

searchUrl.description: Complete search URL with all parameters

origin.description: Resolved origin airport code used for this search

destination.description: Resolved destination airport code used for this search

mode.description: Indicates whether these options vary departure dates or return dates

sort.description: Ordering applied to the options array

tools.name: sk_hotels_search
tools.title: Skiplagged Hotel Search
tools.description: Search Skiplagged for hotels in a city with specific check-in and check-out dates, including ratings and pricing.

city.description: City name to search for hotels (will be matched against available cities)

limit.description: Maximum number of hotels to return (default: 12, max: 100)

offset.description: Number of hotels to skip for pagination (default: 0)

sort.description: Sort hotels by price (cheapest first), ranking (highest rated first), value (best value rating), or discount (best deals first, default when deals available)

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

searchUrl.description: Complete search URL with all parameters

currentlyShowing.description: Number of hotels in this result set

tools.name: sk_cars_search
tools.title: Skiplagged Car Search
tools.description: Search Skiplagged for rental cars between pickup and dropoff locations/dates, returning prices, companies, and car details.

limit.description: Maximum number of car offers to return

offset.description: Number of car offers to skip for pagination (default: 0)

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

searchUrl.description: Complete search URL with all parameters

priceRateInDollars.description: Per-day/quoted rate in US dollars for comparison

totalPriceInDollars.description: Total rental price in US dollars

bookingLink.description: Deep link to book this car using the contract token

currentlyShowing.description: Number of cars in this result set

tools.name: sk_hotel_details
tools.title: Skiplagged Hotel Details
tools.description: Fetch room-level availability, pricing, and amenities for a specific hotel and stay dates.

hotelId.description: Hotel ID (from search results) to fetch detailed availability for

live.description: Use live rates (includes booking links). Disable for faster, less accurate cached rates.

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

pricePerNightInDollars.description: Price per night in US dollars

totalPriceInDollars.description: Total price for entire stay in US dollars

bookingLink.description: Direct booking URL for this hotel

checkinDate.description: Check-in date for this detail search (YYYY-MM-DD)

checkoutDate.description: Check-out date for this detail search (YYYY-MM-DD)

pricePerNightInDollars.description: Nightly price in US dollars for this room

totalPriceInDollars.description: Total stay price (room + taxes/fees) in US dollars

taxesAndFeesInDollars.description: Portion of total that is taxes/fees in US dollars

bookingLink.description: Direct booking URL for this room

tools.name: sk_faq_search
tools.title: Search Skiplagged FAQ
tools.description: Search FAQ for relevant answers about Skiplagged - company, stuff, its products, and policies. Useful for customer support and general inquiries

query.description: The search query for FAQ retrieval

top_k.description: Number of top articles to return

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

tools.name: sk_resolve_location
tools.title: Resolve location to airport code
tools.description: Resolve latitude and longitude to the IATA code of nearest airport and city information

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

tools.name: sk_resolve_iata
tools.title: Resolve city name to airport code
tools.description: Resolve a city name to a valid IATA code

input.description: City name code to resolve to IATA code

renderMode.description: Preferred render mode for tool output (ui or text).

server_info_crawled.overview: Skiplagged MCP - Maps & Location MCP server with 10 tools.
